---
title: "System Drift Report: Ghost Logic Audit"
subtitle: "Verification of the Sterling Mandate"
format: html
---

# ◤ SYSTEM DRIFT REPORT ◢

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **GHOST LOGIC**: Source files that lack a corresponding Gherkin `.feature` contract in `.agents/skills/`.

## ◈ Summary
- **Ghost Files Detected**: 232
- **System Coverage**: -132.0% (Estimated)

## ◈ Ghost Logic Registry
| File Path | Gungnir Ω | Breaches |
| :--- | :---: | :---: |
| `src\scratch_forge.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\scratch_plan_b.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\cstar_dispatcher.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\lease_manager.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\mimir_client.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\norn_coordinator.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\payload.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\promotion_registry.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\prompt_linter.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\report_engine.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\set_persona.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\sovereign_hud.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\sterling_auditor.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\sv_engine.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\utils.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\vitals_spoke.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\calculus\intel.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\calculus\logic.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\alfred_observer.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\atomic_gpt.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\bifrost.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\builder.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\cognitive_router.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\context.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\cortex.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\dialogue.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\env_adapter.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\executor.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\heimdall_shield.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\injector.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\instruction_loader.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\memory_db.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\orchestrator.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\reporter.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\skill_forger.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\vector.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\vector_calculus.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\vector_config.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\vector_ingest.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\vector_router.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\vector_shadow.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\gungnir\ledger.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\core\engine\gungnir\universal.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\crucible\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\cstar\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\cstar\core\daemon.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\cstar\core\rpc.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\cstar\core\uplink.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\cstar\core\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\main.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\ui.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\engine\adjudicator.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\engine\campaign_updater.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\engine\gm_client.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\engine\logic.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\engine\models.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\engine\persistence.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\engine\rng.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\engine\scenarios.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\games\odin_protocol\engine\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\agent_loop.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\ceremony.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\cortex_link.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\deployment.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\setup.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\ans.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\bdd_master.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\CognitiveRouter.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\CorvusProcess.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\economy.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\EventManager.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\heartbeat.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\hud.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\nexus.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\python_utils.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\state.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\commands\dispatcher.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\commands\mcp.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\commands\pennyone.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\commands\python.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\commands\start.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\core\commands\vitals.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\gateway\server.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\gateway\plugins\corvus.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\gateway\routes\api\intent.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\gateway\routes\api\mimir.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\node\gateway\routes\ws\events.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\code_sanitizer.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\coordinator.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\git_spoke.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\harvest_responses.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\main_loop.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\muninn.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\muninn_crucible.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\muninn_heart.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\muninn_hunter.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\muninn_memory.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\recreate_chapter.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\repo_spoke.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\sandbox_warden.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\score_cohesion.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\taliesin_forge.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\x_api.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\_bootstrap.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\base.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\freya.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\ghost_warden.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\huginn.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\mimir.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\runecaster.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\sandbox_warden.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\scour.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\shadow_forge.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\taste.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\valkyrie.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\sentinel\wardens\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\install_skill.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\skill_forge.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\local\dormancy.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\local\CacheBro\cache_bro.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\local\KnowledgeHunter\hunter.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\local\SkillLearning\learn.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\local\VisualExplainer\visual_explainer.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\local\WildHunt\wild_hunt.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\skills\local\workflow_analyst\analyze_workflow.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\synapse\synapse_auth.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\synapse\synapse_sync.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\synapse\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\acquire.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\archive_consolidator.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\benchmark_engine.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\brave_search.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\code_sentinel.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\compile_failure_report.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\compile_session_traces.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\corvus-control-mcp.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\danger_room.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debt_viz.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\gemini_search.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\generate_tests.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\js_sentinel.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\latency_check.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\lightning_rod.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\list_models.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\loop.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\merge_traces.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\migrate_to_qmd.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\network_watcher.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\overwatch.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\perimeter_sweep.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\security_scan.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\sentinel_perf.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\trace_viz.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\tune_weights.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\update_gemini_manifest.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\user_feedback.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\utility_belt.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\vault.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\voice_check.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\wrap_it_up.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\data\dedupe_corrections.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\data\expand_thesaurus.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\data\overfit_corrections.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\data\sanitize_thesaurus.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\data\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\audit_dialogue.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\catalog_check.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\check_pro.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\cjk_check.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\collision_investigator.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\debug_engine.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\debug_fishtest.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\debug_fishtest_phase2.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\debug_perf.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\diag_engine.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\quick_check.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\runecaster_audit.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\verify_fish.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\debug\__init__.py` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\analyzer.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\crawler.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\daemon.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\index.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\mcp-server.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\parser.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\pathRegistry.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\personaRegistry.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\types.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\calculus\intel.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\calculus\logic.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\chronicle.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\compiler.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\database.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\git_monitor.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\git_trainer.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\gravity_db.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\llm.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\mock_provider.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\semantic.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\intel\writer.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\live\recorder.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\live\search.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\live\socket.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\live\watcher.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\App.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\main.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\proxy.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\vite.config.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\AgentGhost.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\AuraLayers.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\ConnectionLayer.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\GhostTraceLayer.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\NeuralGraph.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\NodeLayer.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\PlaybackHUD.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\SectorMetrics.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\SelectionPanel.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\SelectionPanelShell.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\TextLabel.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\TrajectoryList.tsx` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\logic\useNeuralData.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\logic\useNodeEffects.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\store\useMatrixStore.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\tools\pennyone\vis\types\index.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |
| `src\types\shims.d.ts` | 0.0 | 0 |

---
> *"Complexity is the enemy of execution. Excellence is the habit of small corrections."*
